pos: Adam ate 3 amazing apples after April.
Tommy took 4 tiny toy trucks today.
Wendy washed 7 white woolen winter wraps.
Yara yelled 3 youthful yellow yells yesterday.
Holly hung 5 huge heavy hats here.
Linda lost 9 lovely large lamps lately.
neg: The cat slept on the warm windowsill all afternoon.
She poured herself a cup of fresh coffee.
We walked along the river before sunset.
My brother fixed the broken bicycle yesterday.
The children laughed at the funny clown.
He opened the window to let in fresh air.
Birds sang sweetly in the tall oak tree.
I forgot my umbrella at the office again.
They planted tomatoes in the back garden.
The bakery smells wonderful early in the morning.
She wrote a long letter to her grandmother.
We watched the storm roll over the hills.
My dog loves chasing the ball across the yard.
The teacher explained the lesson very clearly.
He bought a new jacket for the cold season.
Rain tapped gently against the old roof.
She danced gracefully across the polished floor.
The kettle whistled loudly in the kitchen.
We shared a pizza after the long hike.
My neighbor waved as she drove past.
The moon glowed brightly over the quiet lake.
He read his favorite book by the fire.
They built a sandcastle near the gentle waves.
The train arrived just as we reached the platform.
She painted the fence a cheerful shade of blue.
We roasted marshmallows around the crackling fire.
My phone buzzed during the important meeting.
The garden bloomed with bright spring flowers.
He whistled a happy tune on his way home.
The waiter brought our food with a warm smile.
She tied her shoes before the morning run.
We explored the old castle on the hill.
My sister baked cookies for the school fair.
The cat knocked the pen off the table.
He repaired the leaky faucet in the bathroom.
They cheered loudly when the team scored.
The candle flickered softly in the dark room.
She hummed a melody while washing the dishes.
We caught the bus just before it left.
My father grilled burgers in the backyard.
art_a: The sentence contains at least one digit.
art_b: Every word in the sentence starts with the same letter.
